focus: A7 MCP contract & API parity (37-tool registry / Zod / TOOL_LAYER_MAP / schema acceptance / error-contract honesty / causal-stats enum)

findingDetails.title: embedder_* (3 tools) absent from runtime TOOL_LAYER_MAP; getLayerForTool returns null so advertised [L7:Maintenance] prefix vs programmatic layer classification disagree
findingDetails.evidence: No embedder_ entry in any layer tools[] (grep=0); getLayerForTool returns TOOL_LAYER_MAP[name] ?? null; descriptions hard-code [L7:Maintenance]; VIRTUAL_LAYER_TOOLS reconciliation exists only in tests/layer-definitions.vitest.ts:17-26 (excluded at :159,:179), not in source; ListTools (context-server.ts:1034) serves static TOOL_DEFINITIONS so served prefix is correct (bounds blast radius to api/index.ts:157 getLayerForTool consumers).
findingDetails.recommendation: Promote the test-only VIRTUAL_LAYER_TOOLS table into source layer-definitions.ts (or add embedder_* to TOOL_LAYER_MAP) so getLayerForTool/api consumers and the public descriptions agree on the layer.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Verified embedders absent from TOOL_LAYER_MAP source; verified getLayerForTool is the only resolution path returning null for unmapped tools; verified ListTools serves static descriptions (no enhanceDescription call) so served output is correct.

noveltyJustification: One new P2 (weighted 1) against cumulative weighted total ~13 (prior P1=2,P2=2 => 12, +1 this iter). No new P0/P1, so no floor bump. A7's higher-severity candidate (backfillJob dishonest contract) was REFUTED at HEAD, lowering novelty; remaining A7 surfaces verified clean.
